examples.title: Quorum Write Protocol
examples.code:
PROCEDURE quorum_write(key, value)
    nodes = get_replicas(key)
    successes = 0
    FOR node IN nodes:
        IF node.write(key, value):
            successes += 1
    IF successes > len(nodes)/2:
        return SUCCESS
    ELSE:
        return RETRY
examples.explanation: Requires majority of replicas to acknowledge write for consistency
